title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kirloskar Electric - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kirloskar Electric - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Kirloskar Electric in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kirloskar Electric:
Kirloskar Electric is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
